ops.body: 2026-07-16, approved plan (plans/lets-see-what-we-synchronous-cookie.md): the 4B/8B/9B base-model sweep lands as an athome research experiment (C4) — `experiments/watcher-base-sweep.toml`, metric_command = `cc-steer retrain --component watcher --score-only --recipe experiments/watcher/recipe.json`, mutable_paths = just that recipe (scorer untouchable by construction), budget max_units=4/max_usd=50/hard_kill_s=14400, unit 0 = ~$2 reachability probe, StubDriver-scripted arms first. Needs C2 (athome.train dedupe; 9B added to athome BASE_MODELS via A8) first. The promote_gate/judged half of this task is superseded by C3 (judged gate via athome Judge/GoldenGate + helpful-coverage). Weekly lane + auto-promote shipped earlier in v0.12.0.
